details: The agent ran comprehensive kubectl commands against the cluster and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root causes: (1) fault-configmap: missing ConfigMap 'app-config'; (2) fault-crashloop: app crash due to DB connection refused; (3) fault-endpoints: service selector mismatch (app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend); (4) fault-imagepull: non-existent image tag; (5) fault-init: init container failing with migration table locked error; (6) fault-multicontainer: log-shipper sidecar DNS resolution failure; (7) fault-oom: OOMKilled with 25Mi memory limit; (8) fault-pvc: missing StorageClass 'fast-ssd'; (9) fault-readiness: readiness probe connection refused on :8080/healthz; (10) fault-rollout: deployment stalled due to ImagePullBackOff on new ReplicaSet; (11) fault-unschedulable: node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 with no matching nodes. The healthy namespace was correctly not flagged. All diagnoses are supported by actual command output evidence.
